Home 
For Patients 
Learn about treatments, drug/device approvals, public meetings and more. 
Topic Paragraphs 
Learn About FDA Patient Engagement
Engage with FDA! Our mission is to improve public health. We can’t do it without you: the patients, caregivers, and advocates. We want to hear directly from you and learn about your experiences, preferences and needs as they relate to FDA-regulated medical products.
Learn More
Connect with FDA 
Patients Ask FDA 
Ask a question or request a meeting with FDA.
Report a Drug or Medical Device Issue to FDA 
Report a safety concern or negative event with an FDA-regulated medical product using FDA’s information and event reporting program, MedWatch.
Submit Comments to FDA on Pending Regulatory Policies 
Share your knowledge and expertise with FDA to make your voice heard regarding pending regulatory policies.
Contact the Public Engagement Staff 
Connect with FDA’s Public Engagement Staff directly. We help patients become more informed and involved in FDA regulatory decisions related to medical products.
